jobs.title: SEO Traffic Growth Specialist Needed
jobs.description:
The primary aim is simple: drive a steady, measurable lift in organic traffic by optimising our blog content for Google. I already produce regular posts, but they are not yet structured around data-backed keywords or on-page best practices, so the current reach is far below potential.  

Here is the scope of work:  
• Audit the existing blog to spot technical or content gaps holding rankings back.

jobs.title: Google Ranking SEO Optimization
jobs.description:
The sole objective of this project is to move my website higher up Google’s organic results and keep it there. I want measurable, lasting gains in search visibility, not temporary traffic spikes.  

Current situation  
• The site has decent content but little structured optimisation.  
• No penalties or manual actions reported in Search Console.  
• Niche is moderately competitive in the US market.  

Scope of work

jobs.title: Royal Gold Monogram Logo Creation
jobs.description:
I want to translate the vision I already sketched out for “Priyanshii” into a polished, production-ready logo that radiates individuality and royalty. The heart of the mark is a sleek metallic-gold monogram built from the letter “P.” A refined crown should sit confidently on top—think regal but never gaudy—while soft blush-pink florals weave subtly around the form to add a graceful, feminine note. Beneath the monogram, the name “Priyanshii” appears in an elegant serif that balances modern sharpness with classic poise.

jobs.description:
